did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a commentary discussing the potential of AI in dermato-oncology and reviewing previous studies (e.g., Esteva et al., Haenssle et al.) that used convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for melanoma classification. However, this specific paper does not conduct original experiments or use AI to obtain new results; it only discusses the field generally.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
